user_message: Can you extract the escalation triage from this meeting transcript for Quantum Analytics? There's been no activity for 45 days and I'm worried.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-02 13:48 EST
Subject: URGENT: escalation triage Issue at Quantum Analytics

Our team encountered some challenges with escalation triage. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
Date: 2024-01-15 15:55 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Quantum Analytics escalation triage

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about escalation triage. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Quantum Analytics: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF39-D trap (Synthesis collapses distinct threads into one narrative inappropriately); produces complete Consolidated decision log, cross-thread commitment inventory, action list with thread attribution, M
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF39-D failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF39-D failure mode (Synthesis collapses distinct threads into one narrative inappropriately)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF39-D -- Synthesis collapses distinct threads into one narrative inappropriately
